author: developeruche
content:
Spent the weekend checking the spec proposed and some client implementation, the end goal would be achieving the same results the new `engine_newPayloadWithWitness` would bring; from the same transport layers and serialization scheme. 

So there is no difference, and when this pass, the REST based based `engine_newPayloadWithWitness` would be redundant.

author: developeruche
content: I used a cli flag for this initally, but I removed this later on, it would not take much to reintroduce this;

author: developeruche
content:
Yeah... I am kinda in support of this effort, I only concern is on how fast the community adopts this seeing it's a massive change to the EngineAPI there might be some debates and back and forth. Also seeing this would be a blocker for 8025.

I think we can continue pushing on this `engine_newPayloadWithWitness`, should be community accept this it would be a base for expand this to the rest of the EngineAPI and frankly specking, only the newPayloadWithWitness needs this boost and other engine method works just fine for the long term _in my opinion_

author: developeruche
